steps.clue: Stand on the four elevator symbols at the same time.
Activate the four floor symbols in the correct order.
Shoot the two orbs from the dragon statues with a sniper rifle.
Shoot both orbs with the Sliquifier until they spin.
Aim four Trample Steams at the tower and launch zombies toward it.
Punch the tower columns in the Mahjong-tile order.
